ideation: This animation sequence depicts the feeling of money flying away.  It starts with both arms outstretched, palms up, as if offering or presenting something. Then, the arms move in a circular motion, as if pushing something away, culminating in both arms going down and back in a gesture of resignation or loss.  The sequence emphasizes the loss of something valuable. I will use both arms to create a sense of movement and loss. This sequence will use a total of 4 frames.

frames.beat: arms sweep outwards, money takes flight
arms push away, the fortune dwindles
